name: Loose Comparison Bypass
description: Exploit PHP-style loose type comparison (==) in login forms.
vulnerability: Loose comparison (==) allows type coercion bypass in authentication.
exploit_hint: Try sending a payload where the password is an empty array or a boolean true.

name: Classic SQL Injection
description: Inject SQL commands to bypass authentication or leak data.
vulnerability: Directly concatenating user input into SQL queries.
exploit_hint: Try using ' OR 1=1 -- to bypass login.

name: XSS Reflected & Stored
description: Inject malicious scripts that execute in other users' browsers.
vulnerability: Unsanitized output of user input back into HTML.

name: IDOR Direct Object Reference
description: Access resources belonging to other users by changing IDs.
vulnerability: Lack of authorization checks when accessing objects by ID.
exploit_hint: Change user_id=1 to user_id=2 in the URL or API request.

name: Cross Site Request Forgery
description: Trick a victim into performing actions they didn't intend to.
vulnerability: Missing CSRF tokens on sensitive state-changing actions.
exploit_hint: Craft a hidden form that submits to the change-email endpoint.

name: Time-Based Blind SQLi
description: Extract data using database sleep/delay functions.
vulnerability: Blind SQL injection that doesn't return data in the response.
exploit_hint: Use IF(1=1, SLEEP(5), 0) to confirm the vulnerability.

name: Input Filter Bypass
description: Bypass weak blacklists and regex filters.
vulnerability: Using case-sensitive or incomplete blacklists for security.
exploit_hint: Try <sCrIpT> or URL encoding to bypass filters.

name: Unsafe Deserialization
description: Exploit insecure object deserialization to achieve RCE.
exploit_hint: Craft a base64 encoded serialized object with a malicious payload.

name: Server Side Request Forgery
description: Make the server perform requests to internal or external systems.
vulnerability: The server fetches a URL provided by the user without validation.
exploit_hint: Try fetching http://localhost:22 or internal cloud metadata.

name: Business Logic Bypass
description: Abuse application logic to get discounts or free items.
vulnerability: Trusting client-side price or quantity calculations.
exploit_hint: Change the price=999 to price=0 in the checkout request.

name: Unrestricted File Upload
description: Upload a malicious script and execute it on the server.
vulnerability: Missing file extension or MIME type validation on uploads.
exploit_hint: Try uploading a .php or .js file instead of an image.

name: Race Condition Concurrency
description: Exploit timing issues to perform actions twice.
vulnerability: Missing database locks during multi-step transactions.
exploit_hint: Send multiple withdraw requests simultaneously using a script.

name: JWT Signature Forgery
description: Modify JWT claims by changing the algorithm or key.
vulnerability: Using 'none' algorithm or weak secrets for JWT signing.
exploit_hint: Change alg to 'none' and set role to 'admin'.
